$comment: Ch 5 — THE CORNER, anchor scenario (Splash Bros archetype). Authored from SCENARIO_SPECS_v1.md + SCENARIO_VOICE_v1.md (locked 2026-05-21). Per BASKETBALL_JOURNEY v2 §7, voice uses location + era ('SPLASH FROM THE WEAKSIDE CORNER.'), never the athlete's name.

meta.title: SPLASH FROM THE WEAKSIDE CORNER.
meta.subtitle: CH 5 — THE CORNER, ANCHOR
meta.authorIntent: Deep weakside corner three. d=7.0 (≈23 ft), h_r=2.5 (high release off a screen), h_h=3.05. Textbook answer θ=55°, v=8.79 m/s. Verification: t = 7.0 / (8.79·cos 55°) = 1.388 s; y(1.388) = 2.5 + 8.79·sin(55°)·1.388 − ½·9.8·1.388² = 3.052 m — matches h_h (err 0.002 m). Cultural framing is location + era ('SPLASH FROM THE WEAKSIDE CORNER.'), not the athlete — per BASKETBALL_JOURNEY v2 §7. Chapter payoff: the line is no longer the lesson, it's the asset.

situation.questionRevealed: Find an angle θ and velocity v that lands the ball through the hoop.

subheadVariants.1: Came up short. Corner legs gave out on the catch.
subheadVariants.3+: Short again. Power well below threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Front iron. The catch-and-shoot was rushed flat.
subheadVariants.2: Still front iron. Lift the arc.
subheadVariants.3+: Front iron again. Push the angle higher.

subheadVariants.1: Back iron. Too much pace on the catch.
subheadVariants.2: Still back iron. Cut the velocity.

subheadVariants.1: Long. The release outran the geometry.
subheadVariants.3+: Far overshoot. Power well above threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Air ball. The line of the shot drifted off the rim.
subheadVariants.2: Air ball again. Aim for the rim.
subheadVariants.3+: Still air ball. Check angle and velocity.

ghostArc.description: Textbook answer θ=55°, v=8.79 m/s. The corner three the dynasty was built on — clean arc, high release, net only.

hints.body: Deep corner, high release. Still projectile.

Two equations, two unknowns:
  x(t) = v·cos(θ)·t
  y(t) = h_r + v·sin(θ)·t − ½·g·t²
d = 7 m, h_r = 2.5 m.
Substitute t = d/(v·cos θ) into y. Try θ near 55°. The high release helps; v lands near 8.8.

workedSteps: Solve y(t) = h_h for v → v ≈ 8.79 m/s.

intro.headline: SPLASH FROM THE WEAKSIDE CORNER.
intro.subhead: Left corner. Full-speed catch. The shortest three in the game.

subheadByFlavor.RIM_DROP: Iron held a three. Generous from the corner.

bracketHintByCategory.FRONT_RIM: Geometry: θ near 55°, push v near 8.8.
bracketHintByCategory.BACK_RIM: Geometry: θ near 55°, cut v by ~0.4.
bracketHintByCategory.SHORT: Geometry: θ near 55°, push v near 8.8.

miss.afterAllHintsCopy: All hints revealed. The math is on the table.
